name: Ashforge Quarry
inside: Smelter yards, bunk rows, counting sheds, armament lockers, and family-held crew barracks sit under constant hazard posture.
interior_patterns: ore extraction is visibly part of daily life.
resilience and ambition rites are short, loud, and tied to shifts, losses, and return from danger
The difference between who belongs, who is tolerated, and who draws scrutiny becomes legible quickly once inside.
